programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Kin'emon make a mad dash to save Law but Navy Admiral Fujitora stands in their way, bringing his full power against them. The Navy is in hot pursuit as a ship approaches with unexpected visitors from the past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After revealing the horrible history of Dressrosa, Toy Soldier now shares their plan to liberate the Tontatta Kingdom and bring down the Doflamingo Family, Operation SOP. Luffy bumps into a heavily-wounded Bellamy and Bartolomeo

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Robin make their way via an underground tunnel dug by the tiny people of the Tontatta Tribe - a tunnel so small in fact, that Franky couldn't fit! Instead, Franky makes his way to the Toy House.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the contenders for the battle of Block D dwindle to only thirty, Rebecca has her hands full with the menacing Suleiman the Beheader! All hope seems lost that she can take him down and move on to the finals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block D comes to a shocking end and the winner that emerges from the cloud of dust stuns the audience even more! Meanwhile, Luffy, Zoro, Kin'emon, and Wicka of the Tontatta Tribe are about to reach the lift to the palace.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Viola, aka Violet, once a great princess of the Dressrosa family, shows Luffy & the others a secret entrance into the palace which avoids the use of the heavily-guarded lift. In the palace's Suit Chamber, Navy Admiral Fujitora reveals his plans.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The final round at the Corrida Colosseum finally begins, as Diamante joins the combatants in an all-out struggle to win the Flare-Flare Fruit! As the stakes escalate, can one champion beat the others & snatch the fruit from the Colosseum's newest hazard?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his group continue their ascent towards Doflamingo's inner sanctum, but standing in their way is an executive of the family whose power is so strong moving past him seems impossible! Meanwhile, Cavendish learns the dark secrets of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Operation SOP finally gets underway but as Leo makes the dash to hide the Tatabasco grape in Sugar's fruit basket, Robin calls for an emergency stop to the plan! Meanwhile, Luffy, Violet, and Zoro are stalled by Pica whose sheer size overwhelms them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Operation SOP is underway and nearing its final stage! But Trebol proves a far stronger guard for Sugar than was expected, so Robin hatches a plan to lure him away. But is there enough time to execute the plan before the ruse is discovered?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are devastated by Trebol's furious attack, but as Usopp tries to convince Leo to abort the operation, Leo tells him about their commander Toy Soldier's stunning true identity! The Toy Soldier finally shakes off Lao G and gets moving again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro continues his deadly duel with the nearly indestructible Pica! While the Toy Soldier narrowly escapes Lao G only to come face to face with Gladius! Luffy continues his mad dash to the top of the palace to face Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the Tontattas beaten, Robin turned into a toy, and Luffy, Franky, and the others busy elsewhere, Usopp is the last hope for Operation SOP! But will he be able to muster the confidence and courage to face the terrible Trebol?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp runs into trouble in his battle with Treebol, and flashback sheds light on how a young Kyros made the shocking transition from murderer to one of King Riku's most trusted men.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the Royal Palace, Viola, Luffy, and the Toy Soldier have hidden themselves outside Doflamingo's chamber, only to have more enemies approach from behind, leaving them surrounded! Meanwhile, Franky is knocked out cold by the Navy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Toys all across Dressrosa regain their human form, a flood of forgotten memories return, and Kyros launches a long overdue attack on the villainous tyrant Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kyros finally taking down Doflamingo leaves Doflamingo's clan shocked! Meanwhile at the Colosseum, Rebecca gets her memories of her loving father Kyros back, and Sabo makes a move to end the championship battle by blowing up the whole ring!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hurries to free Law, but with their pirate alliance dissolved, will Law still see Luffy as an ally? Meanwhile, Usopp has convinced his newfound followers to destroy the factory! Doflamingo's defeat has thrown Dressrosa into chaos.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of Doflamingo's return from the dead is revealed! But there isn't much time to ponder how it happened, as his plan to silence the country of Dressrosa unfolds, spelling doom for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the people of Dressrosa see their friends and loved ones slaughter each other under the manipulation of Doflamingo, memories of 10 years ago rush back, and the truth of that event becomes clear. Doflamingo announces the rules for his deadly game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo and Fujitora's agreement to not engage each other lasts for the moment - meaning all eyes are turned towards taking down the Straw Hats and claiming the rewards! And as Luffy starts heading to the Royal Palace, Fujitora stands in his way!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Usopp, the Tontattas and the others make moves to rejoin Luffy as Doflamingo's deadly game rages on! Meanwhile, Kin'emon makes it to the trash heap in his search for his friend Kanjuro - just as Pica emerges in the town.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy & the others recovering from Pica's attack, the game is afoot! Luffy has just enough time to regroup and set out to find Doflamingo, only to find that the dastardly Warlord has more enemies than he might realize! A strange argument breaks out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao and Elizabello successfully break Pica's giant arm but the rock giant is unfazed and starts throwing even more destructive punches at Luffy and his band of unwanted collaborators! Meanwhile, Navy Admiral Fujitora moves into action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Moocy fast approach the showdown with Doflamingo - while the others with a beef against him continue to tag along. Meanwhile, Violet finds the key to Law's handcuffs, and Rebecca pledges to deliver it to him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes headway toward Doflamingo's refuge, making his way through Doflamingo's guards, while down below Admiral Fujitora faces off against Sabo, who has the power of the Fire Fist from eating the Flare-Flare Fruit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy cuts a lucky break as Kelly Funk shows him a shortcut to the Palace! But all may not be as it seems... Meanwhile, Franky and Zoro are locked in one-on-one duels, while Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo enlist the help of the Tontattas.

programme.title: Ultimate Oceans
programme.desc: Having swum and inhabited our oceans for millions of years sharks have become the perfect predator.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Kangaroo

programme.title: The Secret Lives Of Big Cats

programme.title: Wild Ones

programme.title: Kalahari: The Flooded Desert

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: When a group of bunnies survives a dog attack, this rehab team plays mom until the bunnies are ready to be released. The team also hopes a family of swans will take on a baby cygnet, but mother swan is not so eager to add another baby to her brood.

programme.desc: To the angling world, The U.S. Virgin Islands are famous. St. Thomas is strongly considered one of the hottest blue marlin fishing grounds in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: On the Pacific side of Panama sits and island that has been lost to the test of time… Cebaco…. that is, until James Weise was marlin fishing near it years ago and discovered an untouched fishery.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: No one in the world would deny that the King's crown of sailfish-fishing belongs to Guatemala.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: This week on Americana outdoors, we’re gearing up for what’s promising to be a winter whirlwind of a hunting experience as we venture out on the lookout for Texas Blue Quail!

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: We’re bringing you coverage of the twenty twenty Bass Pro Shops and Cabela’s National Team Championship, and also taking a look back upon the history of the NTC, and learn what it means to our anglers.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: We’re hitting the water with Danny Blandford and Matt McCoy of Secret Lures, as they spend the day out on Kentucky Lake throwing the bait that put Secret Lures on the map, the Stupid Tube!

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: This week on Americana Outdoors, we’re covering the 2020 Boat US Collegiate Bass Fishing Championship, and later, we’re meeting up with the Garmin team and Dr. Dale Rollins to gather insight into quail conservation efforts.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: We’re revisiting several fishing trips where we experimented with throwing multiple baits of varying colors and sizes, and we’ll see how switching up presentation styles and trying new things can lead to you reeling in the most catches possible!

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Americana Outdoors takes a look at ice fishing in Minnesota. Then we’ll migrate south like a duck and go fishing in the spring on the Texas-Mexico Border at the famous Lake Amistad with Wade Middleton and Jeff Reynolds.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Americana Outdoors starts off on Pickwick Lake in Alabama with Clark Wendlandt and Amanda Masters, then we join Mike McClelland in Texas where he shares information on crankbait fishing before wrapping it all up on Lake Beshear in Kentucky.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: It’s the opening weekend of bow season in Texas, and we’re joining Wade Middleton on a whitetail hunt where he’s testing out the brand new Garmin Xero X1i Crossbow Scope. Later, we’re covering the Trinity Oaks Purple Heart Heroes Celebration Hunt.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A shark attacks a vacationer, and a firefighter is bitten by a rattlesnake.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A man crosses paths with a grizzly, and something unknown strikes a surfer.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Meet Laramy "Sasquatch" Miller, one of the last mountain men of the Rocky Mountains. Follow Laramy as he attempts to harvest a huge Canadian moose.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy pursues a big grizzly bear in the remote mountain of British Columbia. Plus, follow Laramy as he does some trapping for beaver.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Can Laramy survive the harsh conditions of elk country? With one misfire and a fresh blanket of snow on the mountains, the task of harvesting an elk for the winter is getting harder and harder.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy is on the hunt for elk in the mountains of Northeastern Washington.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Anita Finch, a 33-year-old Californian woman was found dead in her trailer-park home, clutching a note with words, "Northfield Hospital, ask for ICU." How did her passion for nature develop into an obsession for venomous snakes?

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Donna Munson was an elderly lady who enjoyed feeding the bears that congregated around her home in the woodlands of Ouray, Colorado. Her life ended tragically when she tried to intervene in a conflict between an adult male and a cub.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Cincinnati local is bitten on the face and neck by his 13-foot python. While in a feeding frenzy, the snake coiled around his neck and asphyxiated him as Ted's horrified girlfriend witnessed.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Bear Eats
programme.desc: In this special film, Bear Grylls takes us to nature's kitchen. It seems nothing--except maybe the fat on a camel's hump--is beyond Bear Grylls.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt have an unpleasant confrontation with a group of skateboarding ruffians who don't want to give up their car. Froy and Sonia try to take a vehicle from the world's most volatile couple. Plus, Lou and Froy wind up in unknown territory when...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car. Then, it's Matt and Froy's big repo. Having left the company to start their own, they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center, but will the loaders let their precious car be loaded up without a fight? Then, Matt and Froy find themselves amidst a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repos they've ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers. Then, Lou, Sonia, and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana, confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees. Then, Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Tommy Boy
programme.desc: Tommy's earned his diploma and a job at Callahan Auto Parts. However, the family business starts tanking and now Tommy hits the road with his dad's right-hand man, a smug numberscruncher.

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: In this riotous spin on the mismatched buddy movie, an uptight and by-the-book cop (Reese Witherspoon) tries to protect the gregarious widow (Sofía Vergara) of a drug boss as they race through Texas pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen!

programme.title: Three Amigos!
programme.desc: Steve Martin, Chevy Chase and Martin Short are three wild and crazy caballeros in this comedy adventure that’s a fiesta of fun. Co-starring Phil Hartman and Jon Lovitz, the '¡Three Amigos!' blaze a side-splitting trail across the comedy frontier!

programme.title: Hot Rod
programme.desc: A comedy about a stunt man who’s never successfully landed a jump without wiping out and his attempt to master the biggest stunt of his life.

programme.title: Tommy Boy
programme.desc: Tommy's earned his diploma and a job at Callahan Auto Parts. However, the family business starts tanking and now Tommy hits the road with his dad's right-hand man, a smug numberscruncher.

programme.title: Clerks II
programme.desc: A calamity at Dante and Randall's shops sends them looking for new horizons, but they ultimately settle at Mooby's, a fictional Disney-McDonald's-style fast-food empire. Sequel to the 1994 film by Kevin Smith.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models are called to duty with Miss J and the New York City Fire Department where the girls strut their stuff and show off their quick-change skills.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Benny Ninja, famous for his posing skills, teams up with supermodel Vendela to teach the girls the different stances for catalog, commercial and couture shoots by pitting them against each other in a posing battle on the streets of New York.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tyra surprises the girls in a dance studio and teaches them how to work their fierceness while posing at the end of a runway.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models are spilt into two teams for go-sees with Shoshanna Lonstein, Pamella Roland and Stacey Bendit from Alice & Olivia.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: For the final challenge, RuPaul sends her All Stars on a junket that culminates with a stand-up routine at L.A.'s Comedy Store. Cheri Oteri is their comedy coach and is joined on the judge's panel by The Gossip's Beth Ditto.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens are challenged to perform in a lip-syncing dance number inspired by the legendary historical women. Fashion designer Jeremy Scott guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens' acting chops are tested in parody movie sequels of RuPaul's favorite movies. Pussycat Doll Nicole Scherzinger guest judges.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: An Apache's stealth in tandem with tomahawks, knives, war club, and bow and arrow go up against a killing machine Gladiator's spiked gloves, trident, sica, and armor.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Protected with chain mail and a shield, the barbaric ax-wielding Viking takes on the skill and precision of a Samurai who's armed with a katana, yumi, and metal-studded club.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As they venture deeper into their surroundings, the nine remaining survivalists realize that this terrain is unlike anything they've ever experienced. One participant suffers a serious injury.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The remaining participants dig in for the long haul as they begin building their shelters. While some flourish, others fail and one is threatened by an unwanted visitor in the night.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The smiths get locked and loaded to forge a signature blade out of a 50-caliber flintlock pistol. Then, in the final round, the remaining competitors must recreate a lethal gladiator sword, the Sica.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Edged-weapon mastery is put to the test as four smiths must forge a functional friction folder. Ultimately, only two smiths make it to the final round where they must recreate a Japanese Jumonji Yari.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are challenged to salvage parts of a cannon in order to make signature blades. In the end, two smiths shoot through to the final round where they must recreate the North African Kabyle.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and Charlie track a serial letter bomber.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don believes that a death row inmate has an ulterior motive when he suddenly wants to confess the whereabouts of bodies he buried during his days as a hitman for the mob.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the FBI uncover a possible terrorist attack on Los Angeles that targets the city's water supply.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When thieves hijack a truck filled with valuable medical supplies, $50 million dollars intended for a relief effort in Zambia, and two aid workers, the FBI races a second violent crew intent on getting to the goods first.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: In the wake of a deadly standoff with a mysterious, yet, brilliant bomber, Don and Charlie discover that he was poisoned to keep him from exposing a shocking secret that will change the FBI team forever.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A smart drama series starring Rob Morrow, David Krumholtz, Emmy and Tony Award winner Judd Hirsch and Emmy Award winner Peter Macnicol.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: While searching for missing 37-year-old X-ray technician Teddy Cota, the team discovers that Teddy long believed that when he was a child, he was abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team must determine if a missing nanny is a kidnapping victim or a suspect when she and the infant in her care disappear from her employers' home.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Lynette Shaw (ELIZABETH BERKLEY), the physically transformed winner of the popular surgical makeover reality show "American Goddess," disappears in the midst of a publicity event.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for Colleen McGrath (AUDREY MARIE ANDERSON), a struggling, young, single mother who vanishes after leaving her 3-year-old son in his baby-sitter's care.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In a continued effort to find Colleen McGrath, who had recently been recruited as a drug mule, Samantha goes undercover hoping to be approached by the same drug traffickers.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When a homeless woman goes missing from a shelter, Jack suspects Rick Knowles who manipulated his twin brother, Greg, into confessing to the murders of several other homeless women.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for Peter Dusek (JOSEF SOMMER), a wealthy, 72-year-old murder trial juror, whose disappearance could cause a mistrial.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack endures a brutal deposition by his wife's divorce attorney. The lawyer uses Jack's childhood traumas, his past affair with Samantha and his dedication to his job against him.

programme.title: The Kill Room
programme.desc: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin into an overnight avant-garde sensation, one that forces her to play the art world against the underworld.

programme.title: Two for the Money
programme.desc: After suffering a career-ending knee injury, a former college football star aligns himself with one of the most renowned touts in the sports-gambling business.

programme.title: Lila & Eve
programme.desc: Lila, a grief-stricken mother reeling from her son's murder, attends a support group where she meets Eve, who urges her to take matters into her own hands to track down her son's killers. They soon embark on a journey of revenge, but also recovery.

programme.title: Killer Elite
programme.desc: A special-ops agent must rescue his mentor.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: The story of Richard Kuklinski, the notorious contract killer and family man. When finally arrested in 1986, neither his wife nor daughters had any clue about his real profession.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: Donnie Darko (Theatrical Cut)
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a bizarre accident, a troubled teenager is plagued by visions of a man in a large rabbit suit who manipulates him to commit a series of crimes.

programme.title: Rollerball
programme.desc: Jonathan Cross (Chris Klein) is an all-American hotshot, the most popular player in the fastest and most extreme sport of all time: Rollerball.

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: From Oscar winning director Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER) comes the ultimate battle between man and nature. Once a miracle of genetic engineering, what was created in the lab has evolved to mimic the most dangerous predator of all—humans.

programme.title: Mimic 2
programme.desc: Four years after a terrifying mutation took New York City by surprise, a detective stumbles upon a link between the "mimic" creatures and three grisly new murder victims. The shape-shifting bugs are back.

programme.title: Mimic 3: Sentinel
programme.desc: In the third creature feature in the MIMIC franchise, the bugs are back. After a group of people begin to disappear, a man hypersensitive to germs and confined to a protective bubble, decides to play detective.

programme.title: Tank Girl
programme.desc: In this laugh-a-minute, futuristic Thriller, a mega-villain controls the world's water supply, and it's up to Tank Girl and her outrageous cohorts to end his greedy reign.

programme.title: House of Gucci
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of the family behind the Italian fashion empire. When Patrizia Reggiani marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a spiral of betrayal, decadence, and murder.

programme.title: Suburbicon
programme.desc: From director George Clooney, Suburbicon is the perfect place for Gardner Lodge (Matt Damon) to raise a family. But the tranquil surface masks a disturbing reality, as Gardner must navigate the town's dark underbelly of betrayal, deceit, and violence.

programme.title: School Ties
programme.desc: After receiving a scholarship to an exclusive prep school, working-class teen David Greene becomes a star athlete and wins the attention of a beautiful debutante.

programme.title: Three Riffer Edition: Night of the Living Dead

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor ebrio se estrella en la casa de una familia. Una licencia suspendida no impide que un hombre lleve a su padre a casa. Un auto lleno de adolescentes es detenido en camino a una película.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Huyen los vehículos jugando carreras cuando llega la policía. Un conductor vacilón se ríe de su error. Una mujer fugitiva se preocupa más por su higiene oral que por su orden de captura.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un motociclista casi se mata después de estrellarse en una carretera oscura. En una parada, la policía pide información a los pasajeros. Un conductor joven admite que su situación no es favorable cuando la policía lo detiene.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: El cumpleaños de una mujer termina con una persecución a pie, esposas y muchas lágrimas. Un sospechoso dice que fue gratis. La abuela viene al rescate cuando un joven asustado es detenido sin licencia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor se escapa y finge ser un cliente de lavandería. Los planes de la fiesta se cancelan cuando un joven educado es detenido. Una mujer está angustiada porque el exnovio no la deja entrar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso en propiedad privada hace preguntas en lugar de responderlas. Los policías descubren una gran cantidad de contrabando durante un retén. Un adicto viene a visitar y la policía ayuda.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre desnudo y delirante está en el porche de su vecino. Un conductor trata de correr, pero deja los zapatos atrás. Una pareja tiene dificultad en seguir adelante después de un evento trágico.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una familia llama a la policía porque hay un extraño en su casa. La policía encuentra cosas desagradables en el coche del hijo de una señora. Las tensiones entre un joven y su padrastro llegan a su límite.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La posible sentencia de ir a prisión asusta a un sospechoso y huye. Los oficiales ayudan a unos padres a razonar. La policía intenta detener a una mujer furiosa que atacó a su exnovio con un martillo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se descubre el botín de un ladrón que insiste que lo iba a donar. Encuentran objetos ilícitos en el coche de un supuesto aficionado de beisbol. Muchos problemas vienen por tener vidrios teñidos.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un retén termina mal cuando un conductor que parece cooperar se irrita. Un delincuente de tráfico es capturado con más que una licencia suspendida. Una mujer problemática ignora el aviso de desalojo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer desafiante toma una mala decisión mientras su novio no interviene. Una etiqueta falsa y una historia confusa no pasan la prueba de indagación. Un padre y un hijo pelean en público.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía enfrenta a una pareja en una parada de autobús y todo se complica. Él le llama a su novia para cancelar una fiesta. Se reportó que conducía ebria, pero ella jura que es una trampa del exmarido.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso de robo vuelve para apoyar a su socio en el delito. Una investigación de autos da lugar a persecución. Un tipo que admite haber consumido drogas dice que lo hace de forma responsable.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se persigue a un hombre en un ciclomotor chatarra que no corre más de 40mph. Una mujer culpa a su previa relación tóxica por lo que hay en su auto. Un conductor errático pone a los oficiales en alerta.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución nocturna termina en el jardín de una casa y la policía busca pistas. Una mujer harta habla al grano con un hombre que evita la realidad. Un policía anima a un veterano con mala suerte.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se escapa en el coche de su amigo cuando es atrapado en algo sospechoso. Niega que la ropa del coche sea suya antes de preguntárselo. Un hombre tira por el aire y pone nerviosos a sus vecinos.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor que huye forja su propio camino para escapar. Los oficiales aconsejan al comerciante de autos que invierta en más cámaras de seguridad. Un oficial separa un problema doméstico explosivo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los pasajeros salen cayéndose uno por uno durante una persecución. Un sospechoso tiene algo dudoso en su pantalón. Los ocupantes de un vehículo robado dicen que son víctimas de una mujer misteriosa.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un intento de fuga termina con un camión destrozado y una visita al hospital. Un hombre reconoce cuidadosamente que los objetos son y no son de él. Un oficial calma una lucha doméstica que empezó con la ropa sucia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La investigación nocturna de un hombre produce resultados inesperados. Dos hombres mintieron en vano porque un oficial los reconoció. La policía dice a una mujer para cambiar si ella quiere proteger a sus perros.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La elección de la vestimenta hace que sea fácil seguir a un ciclista fugitivo. Encarcelan a su esposa y no parece preocupado. Una pelea entre esposos aumenta cuando un joven inocente se involucra.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso huye mientras llegan los oficiales. Un consumidor de metanfetamina se niega a cooperar. Un marido malhumorado es arrestado por marihuana y su esposa patea su moto.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales tratan de encontrar sentido de una compra convertida en pelea. Una mujer pide ayuda cuando su novio se deshace de las cenizas de su marido. Un hombre sin camisa tiene una mala actitud.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un ciclista cae al pavimento cuando huye de una patrulla. Un divorcio provoca el enfrentamiento entre un Corvette y un Mustang. Un perro rabioso se lleva lo mejor de una disputa doméstica.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un cliente de mal genio no hace caso y regresa a casa con la oferta taser. Un hombre incoherente no puede explicar por qué golpeo a un hombre. Una parada, un camión lleno de perros, y un maniático.

programme.title: Cutting Edge Comedians of the 60s and 70s: Cutting Edge Comedians of the 60s and 70s (2007)
programme.desc: In the late 1950s, a fresh style of standup comedy emerged tackling previously taboo subjects as sex, religion, politics, and drugs. Here are those comedians who took the big risks years ago and paved the way for today's crop of maverick comics.

programme.title: Phyllis Diller: Not Just Another Pretty Face
programme.desc: Phyllis Diller's brand of comedy is as timeless today as it was in the 1960s when she became a regular on popular variety and talk shows. Phyllis Diller was a pioneer among female comediennes highlights some of her best routines.

programme.title: American: The Bill Hicks Story
programme.desc: A captivating animated documentary on the rollercoaster life of legendary comedian Bill Hicks, whose profound and hilarious observations on American life changed the face of modern comedy.

programme.title: Paul Mooney: Analyzing White America
programme.desc: Paul Mooney is angry, fearless and very funny. Here he takes direct aim at racism and White America and hits his targets with dead-on accuracy and humor.

programme.title: George Carlin: George's Best Stuff
programme.desc: George’s Best Stuff is a compilation of some of Carlin’s legendary routines, including “A Place For My Stuff,” “Dogs and Cats,” “Baseball and Football" and others.

programme.title: George Carlin Personal Favorites
programme.desc: This HBO special presentation highlights the best of his live performances in Los Angeles, New Jersey, Phoenix, and New York from 1977 to 1998.

programme.title: George Carlin: At Carnegie
programme.desc: Taped before a sold-out house at New York City´s Carnegie Hall, the performance represents a creative resurgence for Carlin, following a heart attack earlier that year.

programme.title: George Carlin: On Location at USC
programme.desc: George Carlin’s March 5, 1977 standup concert at the University of Southern California showcases his unique role as America’s first counter-culture comedian.

programme.title: George Carlin: You Are All Diseased
programme.desc: Growing up in New York City, George Carlin was always the class clown. He went on to become one of the great comedians of our time, with an appeal that has spanned generations.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With a group of Wraith hive ships on the way to Atlantis, the team searches for a place to flee and a way to destroy the city. McKay (David Hewlett) leads a team to try and activate the Ancients' orbital weapons platform to destroy the Wraith.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Just as the team is beginning to lose hope, Col. Everett is sent from the Stargate Program on Earth. As Everett and the team strategize, a new battleship, the Daedalus, arrives with a new Zero Point Module, bringing with it new hope.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team is saved with the arrival of Colonel Steven Caldwell, the Daedalus, and the destruction of the two approaching Wraith ships. McKay hopes the Zero Point Module will be the key to their success, meanwhile Ford seems off after an accident.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard starts to question things when strange malfunctions begin to occur after the team returns from a trip to Earth. The team discovers that the Daedalus has been infected with a Wraith Virus, causing the ship to go into survival mode.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The search for Lt. Ford leads Sheppard and Teyla to planet P3M-736 where they are captured by Ronon Dex, a man who is on the run, being hunted by the Wraith. The team offer to help Ronon, going up against the Wraith once again.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While on Planet Thenora, the team is shocked when McKay and marine officer Laura Cadman are suddenly taken aboard a Wraith Dart. When the team shoots down the Dart, they discover a technical glitch has put Cadman's consciousness in McKay's body.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Greer and Wray find themselves trapped in the midst of an attack when an alien ship carrying a radioactive bomb crashes into Homeworld Command. Meanwhile, Rush (Robert Carlyle) discovers that not everyone wants Greer and Wray back aboard Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: While connected to the stones in an attempt to contact Homeworld Command, Chloe wakes up with Ginn’s consciousness. Eli must find a way to protect Chloe without losing Ginn. Meanwhile, Volker requires a difficult operation to save his life.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Homeworld Command tries to convince an ally they suspect might be infiltrated by the Lucian Alliance to let them use their planet to power up and dial Destiny. Meanwhile, Rush is trapped in a simulation created by Amanda Perry.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: While exploring a planet, the team is attacked and members are taken captive by an alien creature. The team must turn to Varro and his Lucian team for help. Meanwhile, on Destiny, Eli and Brody mistakenly trap Brody in a cryogenic device.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Teal'c mysteriously begins to hallucinate and is haunted by visions of an existence where he is a human being. As his paranoia deepens, Teal'c must rely on the help of friend Daniel Jackson to determine where his dreams end...and his reality begins.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 accompanies the X-53 on its voyage into deep space. When the ship drops out of hyperspace, SG-1 is stranded with no means of getting back to Earth. Their only option lies in exploring a nearby planet where a Stargate is thought to be located.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a civilization desperate to be freed from the clutches of a Goa'uld. While on the planet, Jonas falls ill. His illness is diagnosed as a brain tumor but it gives him the ability to see the future...where SG-1 are walking into a trap!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: While living in recovery, Jenelle copes with an unexpected pregnancy, Leah's daughters prepare for Corey's wedding, Kailyn has her baby shower, and Chelsea confronts Adam.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn and Jo debate her move to Delaware, Chelsea starts esthetician school, Leah takes the girls on vacation in Florida, and Jenelle moves on after terminating her pregnancy.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea and Adam make peace for Aubree, Leah learns more about Ali's muscular dystrophy, Kailyn and Jo clash over spending time with Isaac, and Jenelle sees a lawyer about her felony charge.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn goes house-hunting despite tension with Jo, Jenelle moves in with Nathan, Leah wonders how to accommodate Ali's disability, and Chelsea takes Aubree to her first day of preschool.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn plans her wedding amid a big move, Jenelle thinks about having another baby, Chelsea celebrates her birthday in California, and Leah struggles while Jeremy is away.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle thinks she may be pregnant, Chelsea celebrates Aubree's birthday, Leah worries when Jeremy faints at work, and Kailyn faces Jo in court.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn cracks under the wedding pressure, Aubree meets her new baby sister, Leah prepares Ali for preschool, and Jenelle worries about seeing her ex in court.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah and Corey meet up for Ali's first day of school, Kailyn deals with bridesmaid drama, Chelsea gets a visitation request from Adam, and Barbara acts up after Jenelle gets surgery.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah tells Jeremy she wants to go to marriage counseling, Aubree starts dance classes, Jenelle notices Jace's bad behavior, and Kailyn clears the air with Javi's family.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle hopes a plea deal will keep her out of jail, Leah feels betrayed by Jeremy, Chelsea graduates from beauty school, and Kailyn celebrates her marriage to Javi.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea is blindsided by Adam, Jenelle shares exciting news with Nathan and Barbara, Leah gets Ali her first wheelchair, and Kailyn's mother reaches out.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea adjusts to her new visitation agreement, Jeremy learns about texts between Leah and Corey, Nathan gets arrested for a DUI, and Kailyn goes into labor.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah gets difficult news about Ali from Corey, Jenelle finds out the sex of her baby, Kailyn and Javi butt heads over childcare, and Chelsea gets in trouble over a favor for a friend.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes deciden pagar el dinero del rescate por su hermano, pero Dínora y Fernando no cumplen con la entrega de Gabriela y Juan, y en medio de una balacera huyen con ellos en la camioneta.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La camioneta donde viajan Dínora, Fernando y sus rehenes, se atasca en arenas movedizas, tienen que esconderse en el mangle. Carmela y Malcolm huyen con el dinero, pero son capturados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le dice a Fernando que revise si traen con ellos el dinero, se dan cuenta del engaño de sus empleados. Dínora cambia la ruta para despistar a la policía y hace que se pierdan más.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela se agota en el recorrido por la selva pantanosa, Juan dice que no va a continuar sin ella. Dínora dispara al aire y esto lo escuchan Franco y Óscar, que van tras esa pista.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora admite que están perdidos, no los ha guiado bien, le jura a Fernando que pase lo que pase, Juan no sale con vida, entrada la noche, un animal pica a Dínora. Rosario despierta del coma.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se cansa de cargar a Dínora en una camilla improvisada y propone continuar sin ella. Eva decide ayudar a Benito y se asocia con él para crear una fábrica de hamburguesas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora se aferra a Juan como su última salvación, desesperada ataca a Fernando, quien le dispara y ve cómo el cuerpo de ella se pierde en el pantano. Rosario se disculpa con Franco y Sara.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Aníbal, el tío de los Reyes, se encarga de organizar la expedición de rescate, lo acompañan Franco, Óscar y la policía. A Juan se le agudiza el dolor de la pierna y Fernando se va por su lado.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan y Gabriela se cuentan sus historias familiares y él menciona al tío Aníbal, a quien estaban buscando al llegar a la región, pero no lo hallaron y por eso pasaron mucho trabajo en el pueblo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La cuadrilla continúa buscando, Juan y Gabriela los escuchan y tienen esperanzas de sobrevivir. Fernando reaparece cuando ellos encuentran una salida y los amenaza, pero cae en el lodo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan y Gabriela son rescatados, él no esconde la alegría cuando ve a sus hermanos y finalmente se reencuentra con Norma, Gabriela está muy débil, es hospitalizada. Eva y Aníbal se reconocen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela le pide perdón a sus hijas y a su padre, quiere un nuevo comienzo, a su salida del hospital, su familia le prepara una fiesta sorpresa. Franco y Sara se casan, finalmente reina la paz.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes deciden pagar el dinero del rescate por su hermano, pero Dínora y Fernando no cumplen con la entrega de Gabriela y Juan, y en medio de una balacera huyen con ellos en la camioneta.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La camioneta donde viajan Dínora, Fernando y sus rehenes, se atasca en arenas movedizas, tienen que esconderse en el mangle. Carmela y Malcolm huyen con el dinero, pero son capturados.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The five remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Pinang Peranakan Mansion in Penang, Malaysia and head to Singapore, where they learn that a U-Turn awaits.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Marina Barrage in Singapore and fly to Shanghai, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Shanghai Science and Technology Museum, with Louie and Michael knowing a Speed Bump awaits them.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Brent and Caite, Jet and Cord, and Dan and Jordan leave Shanghai and head to San Francisco and the finish line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: This season's racers are introduced and for the first time in the history of The Amazing Race, the team to finish in first place will be awarded a surprise, game-changing advantage.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One team considers using their precious Express Pass after playful Ghanaian locals give some teams a headache while they struggle to complete the high-stakes roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A challenging detour tests one couple's relationship, while another team's Racer requires medical attention, threatening their position in the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After teams volunteer at a local school in Ghana, THE AMAZING RACE makes it's first-ever trip to the Arctic Circle, where one couple finds themselves in an unfortunate position and contemplate making a game changing decision.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A vegetarian racer struggles with a difficult decision when faced with a Norwegian delicacy, and Teams face their fears of heights during a gut-wrenching Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers struggle to complete their creative detours before putting in a proper day's work in the fields, where they discover the key to potato farming is manure.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are clowning around when they learn a traditional Russian circus act, but it's no joke when multiple teams make a critical error and misread a clue, jeopardizing their positions in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Following a huge mistake, one Racer makes an important decision that will impact their team beyond the finish line and for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tension among the teams runs high when, for the first time ever, two teams are U-turned and have to complete an extra task, jeopardizing their chances of making it to the final four.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A nationally known con man becomes a hero to Aunt Bee, Opie and Barney when he is held for two days in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy plays matchmaker for Barney but finds himself in difficulty when Barney misinterprets his efforts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie struggle to keep house when Aunt Bee leaves for a few days.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy finally proposes to Ellie when he becomes convinced that the new young doctor in town is trying to steal his girl.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Town drunk, Otis Campbell, turns out to be the only living descendant of a Revolutionary War hero, much to the dismay of the mayor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A state inspector learns some unique but effective police methods employed by the Mayberry sheriff.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie give the Cinderella treatment to a farmer's daughter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, faced with the unpleasant duty of serving an eviction notice, discovers a way to save the mortgagee's home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has to deliver a baby for a farmer's wife when the local doctor is unavailable.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Through a series of coincidences, Barney captures a dangerous criminal--twice.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy helps a local musician get back to reality after success goes to his head.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Aunt Bee find that a good father-son relationship is more important to Opie than keeping him away from the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy teaches his son how to handle a seven-year-old bully.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney resigns when he thinks Andy is trying to ease him out of his deputy sheriff job.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An attractive young woman, who has been given a speeding ticket by Andy, pleads "not guilty" and uses female guile.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An old penniless citizen of Mayberry forestalls his eviction by trying to redeem a century-old municipal bond.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney almost loses his shirt and his girlfriend when a charming female con artist dupes him.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie's friendship with a hobo begins to affect his ability to tell right from wrong.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A bogus FBI agent and his accomplice nearly make off with the Mayberry Bank money.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is too obvious in his efforts to find out if a young lady meets his expectations.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee takes a shine to an itinerant handyman who has a way with the ladies.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy refuses to join an exclusive club when Barney's bid for membership is turned down.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Rather than eat Aunt Bee's indigestible homemade pickles, Andy and Barney secretly substitute store-bought pickles in her preserving jars.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A trial run as Sheriff of Mayberry convinces Barney that he is not quite ready to take over a similar job in a neighboring town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy dissuades a visiting farmer from marrying Barney's girl.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie keeps a secret club oath even in the face of the serious accusation of burning down a barn.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy teaches a wealthy young man the satisfaction of self-reliance.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Find yourself in a gorgeous late-afternoon mountain masterpiece by Bob Ross -- breathtaking purples skies, defined evergreens, and smooth lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Pick up your brushes and paint along with Bob Ross - he creates a beautiful, rocky stream gently rippling through the forest mist in an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today Bob Ross creates a fantastic southwestern mountain scene with spectacular red peaks looming over a lazy, tree-lined stream.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this painting, Bob Ross presents a most statuesque ridge of peaks overlooking a little country home by the cove.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Step into the natural beauty of an overgrown colorful mead and enjoy the peace and soft tranquility you get from Bob Ross's painting technique.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A beautiful mountain painting in an oval - with a surprising twist! - as Bob Ross creates a lonely cabin embraced by lovely lacy bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a leisurely hike down a weathered pathway with Bob Ross and happen upon an old cabin; create a beautiful oval painting you can be proud of.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you on a journey through the majestic forest where you can smell the sweet aroma of pines and taste cool mist in the air.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel to the tropics with Bob Ross, stroll along the palm tree shores, and drink in the soul-cleansing beauty of the sea. An oval masterpiece you'll enjoy.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates an oval scene with warm brown and gold tones that captures the essence of a lonely forest river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up and endure the cold weater in this snow filled adventure; Bob Ross paints a wintry mountain scene using only Grey and White tones.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Swim in the warm water, nap in the luxurious green grass - today Bob Ross creates a wonderful summer mountain scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross puts a lonesome cabin in the middle of a snowy setting as an unexpected place of respite for the weary traveler.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Majestic snow-covered peaks and evergreens loom over lush green grasslands as Bob Ross takes you into his world of natural beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel down an abandoned road with Bob Ross and stumble upon an old weathered barn that has seen better days - what dreams are made of.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses a little imagination and lots of colors to create this soft, luxurious early autumn lake scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross for a happy half-hour as he creates one of his beautiful mountain and evergreen scenes, complete with path and ample bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross today as he paints a huge, single stately oak, just on the edge of the forest, its spreading branches and foliage providing comfort and shelter.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Experience the serenity and silence of a fresh undisturbed snowfall with Bob Ross when he takes you to a lovely cabin deep in northern country.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Majestic mountains reign over a colorful seascape as Bob Ross creates one of the most challenging masterpieces ever painted in a half-hour.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores some of Africa's best national parks, like the world-famous Serengeti, Botswana's Chobe National Park, and Lope National Park in Gabon. Forest elephants, Leopards, Hippos, Crocs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family search everywhere for chimpanzees in Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest. They get up close and personal with some colobus monkeys and Jack meets an old friend who is pioneering a conservation effort for the local women.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Ever wonder what Jack's favorite animal encounters have been? Get ready to dive with the great white and meet it face-to-face. It's all part of the fun when Jack chooses his favorites on the next Animal Adventures!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he heads to South Africa to meet a very special, and critically endangered, Southern black Rhino named Munu, who's lost his vision, but found his forever home at Founder's Lodge.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Conservation Heroes
programme.desc: Come along on this adventure as Jack counts down his heroes! From legends in the conservation world… to everyday folks who have dedicated their lives to animals, meet people who are making a difference for animals, like elephants, rhinos, horses and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen explore Phinda Game Reserve in South Africa alongside Lions, Hippos, Rhinos, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Akagera National Park in Rwanda, once devastated by poaching, to see its transformation and thriving populations of Hippos and Crocodiles and a homecoming for African Crowned Cranes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along for some epic Hanna family adventures like game ranger training in South Africa, babysitting a wombat in Tasmania, trekking with mandrills in Gabon, a horseback safari through Montana and a trip to meet some donkeys in Arizona!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Canada's British Columbia, Jack flies by floatplane to Knight Inlet where he observes Grizzly Bears fattening up for hibernation on Pacific Salmon.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Born in the U.S.A
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is filled with homegrown adventures, from right here in the ole U. S. of A! Moose, cougars, gators and even an underwater adventure from America’s 50th state!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack treks deep into the rainforests of Gabon in search of Mandrills. The elusive and brightly colored primates are the largest monkeys in the world, and can only be found in Africa's equatorial rainforests.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a journey with some of the animal kingdom's most outstanding omnivores! Baboons, Black Bears, Chimpanzees, two-toed Sloths and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Amazing Australia
programme.desc: G’day mates, this countdown is heading Down Under to meet up with Australia’s rare and wonderful creatures! From dingoes and devils, to kangaroos and cassowaries, come along for an Australian odyssey as Jungle Jack counts them down to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Get ready for the trek of a lifetime, deep into the forests of Gabon, as Jack searches for elusive lowland Gorillas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he embarks on a safari through Florida's Everglades, where he comes face-to-face with alligators and rattlesnakes. And, a rare look at the Native American traditions of the Seminole Tribe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he heads to Australia's Gold Coast. Meet a rare blue-eyed koala, feed a Tasmanian devil and watch a tiger jump over Jack! Things get messy when Jack meets up with some boys from the outback and tries his hand at an Aussie tradition.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Baby, You're the Greatest
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is going more than a little baby crazy! Today, cute and cuddly creatures guaranteed to make you smile. A darling orangutan, wee little warthogs, a sleeping baby bear and more cuteness than you can count!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Asia to visit the Singapore Zoo. Regarded as one of the top zoos in the world, this open-concept park is full of surprises for Jack and Sue, like orangutans swinging in the trees just feet above their heads

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Creepiest Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he counts down ten of his creepiest encounters with venomous vipers, huge tarantulas, bats, bugs and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down some of the mightiest mouths in the animal kingdom, including Great White Sharks, Hyenas, Lions, Hippos, Nile Crocodiles, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he discovers what it’s like to work in the wild thanks to six of the wildest guides ever. African Elephants, Hippos, Guanacos, Gorillas, Wildebeest, Zebra, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Mt. Kenya where not one, but two extinct species are about to make a comeback. Come along with Jack as he discovers how the elusive bongo antelope and the stunning white zebra are being reintroduced Into the Wild.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From extremely endangered whooping cranes and powerful grizzly bears, to adorable red pandas and African hippos, this place has it all! Jack's crew even gets an extra special behind-the-scenes experience at the gorilla habitat.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Today’s tales are truly from the heart. Magellanic penguins singing a love song, African lions finding the perfect mate, bald eagles raising a family, Dudley the most loveable Cow in Tennessee, and more love-able creatures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is back at the barnyard with six of his favorite farm animal friends, like pot-bellied pigs, horses, cows, and even camels!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack boards a submarine heading deep into the waters of Curacao, uncovering everything from lionfish to newly discovered species. Then Jack and the team from the Columbus Zoo work to rehabilitate coral reefs by planting baby coral in the ocean.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he finds penguins sharing a beach with swimmers, big horn sheep colliding with the big city, zebras stopping traffic in California and more wild encounters in the city.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An author (Tom Poston) is blackmailed by his secretary; a father and son (Geoffrey Scott, Clark Brandon) unwittingly fall for the same woman (Markie Post).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An Army captain (Beth Howland) sets her sights on Gopher; a married couple (Charlotte Rae, Louis Nye) meet up with two swingers (Jamie Farr, Heather Locklear).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Everyone is a suspect when a passenger goes missing about the Pacific Princess. Meanwhile, when Julie's high-school friend boards the ship with her son, they learn an important lesson after running into the woman's father and another passenger.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A carnival entrepreneur is approached on the Pacific Princess by a woman who knows a shocking secret about his past. Meanwhile, a comedy duo with a bear act competes for the affection of the same woman.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: On a Hong Kong cruise: a senator romances a woman until he learns the nature of her visit; two brothers date Julie and Vicki; a compulsive shopper is offered $25,000 by her husband (Herb Edelman) if she'll resist temptation during the trip.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An international fugitive finds love when he meets a beautiful woman with a secret, while a divorcee meets an intriguing man who conceals his identity from her and Isaac.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A rich widow comes face to face with her estranged sister, who's working on the ship as a made and whose boyfriend the wealthy woman stole and married 40 years earlier. Meanwhile, a childless couple hatches a plan to become parents.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man bound by alimony wants to make sure his ex (Michelle Phillips) goes through with her marriage; Julie's Aunt Sylvia and her pal Betsy try to interest a publisher in Betsy's memoirs.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac's budding relationship with a new crew member becomes complicated when Gopher tells him to fire her. Meanwhile, a congressman and his wife bring their daughter aboard the Pacific Princess after receiving letters threatening her young life.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A gambling cruise for charity proves a chancy thing for a teacher (McLean Stevenson), two honeymooners (Shea Farrell, Leah Ayres), and the drive chairwoman (Celeste Holm). Richard Jaeckel, Antony Ponzini, Jo Ann Pflug, Gavin MacLeod.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Captain Stubing hires a handsome new photographer who draws the attention of two sisters who were visiting Doc and Gopher. Then, a young man is shocked to meet his mother's (Lee Meriwether) new boyfriend, who is the same age as him.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An inventor's zealousness jeopardizes his chance for romance and a man's double identity upsets Julie and a passenger.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol investigan el paradero de sus amigos después de que Pamela los hiciera desaparecer de la Commonwealth. Por desgracia, su única pista es Hornsby. Por otro lado, Pamela le pide a Yumiko que procese a Eugene en nombre de la Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de separarse de sus hijos, Maggie, Gabriel y Rosita siguen un convoy militar hasta un destino misterioso. Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan y Annie acaban en una zona de obras. Daryl y Carol siguen a un tren que lleva a Connie a bordo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel y Negan organizan una revuelta clandestina contra los guardianes. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se unen a Luke y a Jules durante su huida a la costa. Además, Eugene es juzgado con el apoyo de Yumiko como abogada defensora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
